content.text: The system shall display Efficiency Analytics under the MEPS module within the MHE section in the left navigation panel and allow users to access the screen upon selection.
access Efficiency Analytics from the MHE → MEPS navigation
the user is on the MHE module
the user selects MEPS → Efficiency Analytics from the navigation panel
the system shall open the Efficiency Analytics screen.
The system shall highlight the active menu item (Efficiency Analytics) in the navigation panel when the screen is selected.
the active menu item to be highlighted
I know which screen is selected
the Efficiency Analytics screen is open
the user views the navigation panel
the system shall highlight “Efficiency Analytics” as active.

The system shall support vertical scrolling within the Efficiency Analytics screen to allow users to view all analytics components (e.g., charts, cards, and sections) when the content exceeds the visible screen height.
I can view all dashboard components
the content exceeds the visible screen height
the system shall allow vertical scrolling.
The system shall display the Efficiency Analytics dashboard page when the user navigates to the efficiency analytics module.
the user navigates to Efficiency Analytics
the system shall display the dashboard.
The system shall display a tab navigation bar containing Pallet Efficiency, Fleet Efficiency, Environment Efficiency, and Trends & Insights tabs.
the user views the tab bar
the system shall display Pallet Efficiency, Fleet Efficiency, Environment Efficiency, and Trends & Insights tabs.
The system shall highlight the Pallet Efficiency tab as active when the user selects it.
the selected tab to be highlighted
the user selects the Pallet Efficiency tab
the system shall highlight Pallet Efficiency.
The system shall display summary metric cards at the top of the Pallet Efficiency dashboard.
I can quickly understand key metrics
the Pallet Efficiency dashboard is displayed
the system shall display summary metric cards at the top.
The system shall display the Average Cycle Time metric card showing the average pallet movement cycle duration.
the system shall display “Average Cycle Time” card.
The system shall display the Average Cycle Time value in minutes.
the Average Cycle Time card is displayed
the system shall display value in minutes.
The system shall display the Warehouse Pallet Efficiency metric card showing the overall pallet movement efficiency across the warehouse.
the system shall display “Warehouse Pallet Efficiency” card.
The system shall display the Warehouse Pallet Efficiency value as a percentage.
the system shall display value as percentage.
The system shall display the Empty Travel Rate metric card indicating the percentage of movements where MHE travels without carrying pallets.
the system shall display “Empty Travel Rate” card
The system shall display the Empty Travel Rate value as a percentage.
the system shall display value as percentage.
The system shall calculate Empty Travel Rate based on the ratio of empty        travel distance or time to the total travel distance or time of MHE movements.
the system shall compute empty travel rate based on empty vs total travel.

15.title: View Average Pallet Distance Travel Card

content.text: The system shall display the Average Pallet Distance Travel metric card representing the average distance pallets travel during movement operations.
the system shall display “Average Pallet Distance Travel” card.
The system shall display the Average Pallet Distance Travel value in meters.
see average pallet travel distance in meters
the Average Pallet Distance Travel card is displayed
the system shall display the value in meters.
The system shall calculate Average Pallet Distance Travel based on recorded pallet movement distances across warehouse zones.
I can rely on analytics data
pallet movement distance data is available
the system shall calculate average pallet distance across warehouse zones.
The system shall dynamically update the summary metrics when new pallet movement data becomes available in the analytics system.
I can see the latest data
new pallet movement data is available
the system shall update summary metrics dynamically.
The system shall ensure that all metric cards display real-time or latest available analytics data for the selected analysis period.
see the latest or real-time data
the system shall display latest available analytics data for the selected period.

20.title: View Cycle Time Distribution Chart Title

content.text: The system shall display a chart titled “Pallet Cycle Time Distribution.”
the system shall display “Pallet Cycle Time Distribution”.
The system shall display a time range indicator labelled “Last 7 days” next to the chart title to indicate the data analysis period.
the user views the title section
the system shall display “Last 7 days” as the time range indicator.
The system shall display a description text stating “Distribution of pallet movement frequency by cycle time duration.” below the chart title.
I understand what the chart represents
the user views below the title
the system shall display description text for cycle time distribution.
The system shall display the pallet cycle time distribution as a vertical bar chart.
the system shall display a vertical bar chart.
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “Cycle Time Range.”
see cycle time ranges on X-axis
the system shall label it as “Cycle Time Range”.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Frequency (Pallets).”
the system shall label it as “Frequency (Pallets)”.
The system shall categorize pallet movement cycle times into predefined cycle time ranges including 0–5, 6–10, 11–15, 16–20, 21–25, and 25+ minutes.
The system shall represent each cycle time range using a vertical bar whose height corresponds to the number of pallets recorded within that range.
the system shall display bars with height corresponding to pallet count.
The system shall dynamically populate the chart using pallet movement cycle time data retrieved from the analytics data source.
the chart to use real data
the system shall populate chart dynamically.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over a bar in the chart.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the label “Pallets” in the tooltip indicating the number of pallet movements within the selected cycle time range.
The system shall display the total number of pallets corresponding to the hovered cycle time range within the tooltip.
the system shall display total number of pallets.
The system shall display the label “Time Range” within the tooltip.
the system shall display “Time Range” label.

33.title: View Cycle Time Range in Tooltip

content.text: The system shall display the cycle time range associated with the hovered bar (e.g., 6–10 minutes) within the tooltip.
see the cycle time range in the tooltip
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display the cycle time range (e.g., 6–10 minutes).
The system shall display the tooltip adjacent to the hovered bar without obstructing the chart visualization.
the tooltip to be clearly visible
it does not block the chart
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display the tooltip adjacent to the bar without obstruction.
The system shall visually highlight the bar corresponding to the hovered cycle time range.
the hovered bar to be highlighted
I can identify the selected data
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall visually highlight the corresponding bar.
The system shall display a refresh icon in the top-right corner of the chart container.
the user views the top-right corner
the system shall display a refresh icon.
The system shall refresh the pallet cycle time distribution data when the user clicks the refresh icon.
the user clicks the refresh icon
the system shall reload pallet cycle time distribution data.
The system shall update the chart visualization after new pallet movement data is retrieved from the analytics data source.
new pallet movement data is retrieved
the system shall update the chart visualization.
The system shall display a chart titled “Pallets Per Hour – Hourly Trends.”
the system shall display “Pallets Per Hour – Hourly Trends”.
The system shall display the X-axis representing time of day in hourly intervals (00:00 to 23:00).
see time of day on X-axis
the system shall display hourly intervals (00:00 to 23:00).
The system shall display the Y-axis representing pallets handled per hour.
see pallets per hour on Y-axis
the system shall display pallets handled per hour.

42.title: View Line Graphs for MHE Types

content.text: The system shall plot line graphs for each selected MHE type to show pallet handling trends over time.
see line graphs for each MHE type
the system shall plot line graphs for each selected MHE type.
The system shall assign distinct colours to each MHE type and reflect the same in the legend.
different colors for each MHE type
the system shall assign distinct colors and reflect them in the legend.
The system shall display a legend identifying each MHE type with its corresponding colour.
I can identify each MHE type
the system shall display MHE types with corresponding colours.
The system shall provide a date selection control to filter pallet data for a specific day.
I can view data for a specific day
the date selection control is available
the system shall filter the chart data accordingly.
The system shall update the chart dynamically based on the selected date.
the chart to update based on date
the system shall update the chart dynamically.
The system shall provide an MHE type multi-select dropdown allowing users to select one or more MHE types.
the MHE Type dropdown is available
the system shall filter chart data accordingly.
The system shall open the MHE Type dropdown panel when the user clicks on the “MHE Type” control.
the MHE Type control is displayed
the system shall open the dropdown panel.
The system shall display a list of available MHE types in the dropdown.
the system shall display available MHE types.
The system shall display each MHE type with a checkbox for selection.
the system shall display checkboxes for each MHE type.
The system shall allow users to select or deselect multiple MHE types.
the user selects or deselects options
the system shall update selections accordingly.
The system shall display the current selection count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”) at the top of the dropdown.
I know how many items are selected
the system shall display selection count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”).
The system shall enforce a maximum selection limit (e.g., maximum 5 MHE types).
I don’t select too many options
the user tries to exceed the limit
the system shall restrict further selection.
The system shall display selected MHE types with checked, unchecked checkboxes.
the system shall display checked and unchecked states correctly.
The system shall display a helper text indicating the selection limit (e.g., “Select maximum 5 MHE type”).
see helper text for selection limit
I understand how many options I can select
the MHE Type dropdown is opened
the system shall display helper text (e.g., “Select maximum 5 MHE type”).
The system shall update the selected MHE count in real-time as users select/deselect options.
the selection count to update in real-time
the user selects or deselects MHE types
the system shall update the selected count dynamically.
The system shall close the dropdown when the user clicks outside the dropdown area.
the dropdown to close when I click outside
I can continue using the dashboard
the user clicks outside the dropdown
the system shall close the dropdown.

58.title: Update Graph Based on MHE Selection

content.text: The system shall update the graph dynamically based on selected MHE types.
the graph to update based on selected MHE types
the system shall update the graph dynamically.
The system shall provide a refresh control to reload the latest pallet trend data.
I can view the latest information
the user clicks the refresh control
the system shall reload pallet trend data.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over any data point in the graph.
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a tooltip.
The tooltip shall display the selected time (hour).
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display the selected hour.
The tooltip shall display the pallet count for each selected MHE type at that time.
see pallet count for each MHE type
the system shall display pallet count for each selected MHE type.
The tooltip shall display colour indicators matching the graph lines for each MHE type.
the system shall display color indicators matching graph lines.
The system shall visually highlight the hovered data point on the graph.
hovered data point to be highlighted
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall visually highlight the point.
The system shall handle missing data by displaying no values or zero values for that time interval.
data is missing for a time interval
the system shall display zero or no value.
The system shall display continuous line trends connecting hourly data points.
the system shall display continuous lines connecting points.
The system shall display a section titled “Operator–MHE Efficiency Pairing.” With subtitle “Ranked by efficiency score.”
the system shall display “Operator–MHE Efficiency Pairing” with subtitle.
The system shall display a list of operators in card format.
the system shall display operator cards.
Each operator card shall display the Operator name.
the system shall display operator name.
Each operator card shall display the assigned or evaluated MHE identifier (e.g., MHE-006, Order Picker ID).
the system shall display MHE identifier.
Each operator card shall display the efficiency metric value (e.g., time in minutes such as “232.75 min”).
the system shall display efficiency value (e.g., minutes).
The system shall display the optimal MHE recommendation for each operator (e.g., “Optimal MHE: MHE-006”).
the system shall display optimal MHE recommendation.
The system shall rank operator cards based on efficiency score in descending order (best performance first).
the system shall sort cards in descending order.
The system shall visually separate each operator card using spacing or card borders.
the system shall apply spacing or borders.
The system shall display an operator icon/avatar placeholder for each operator.
the system shall display an avatar/icon placeholder.
The system shall support vertical scrolling when the number of operator cards exceeds the visible area.
the system shall support vertical scrolling.
The system shall provide a refresh control to reload the latest efficiency pairing data.
the system shall reload pairing data.
The system shall dynamically update the list when new efficiency data is available.
the system shall update the operator list.
The system shall display a chart titled “Speed vs Productivity Correlation.”
the system shall display “Speed vs Productivity Correlation”.
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “Average Speed (km/h).”
the system shall label it as “Average Speed (km/h)”.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Pallets per Hour.”
see pallets per hour on Y-axis
the system shall label it as “Pallets per Hour”.
The system shall plot scatter data points representing each MHE type based on average speed and productivity values.
the system shall plot data points based on speed and productivity.
The system shall display each MHE type using distinct coloured markers (dots).
the system shall display distinct colored markers for each MHE type.
The system shall display a legend showing MHE types with corresponding colour indicators.
I can identify each MHE type
the system shall display MHE types with corresponding colour indicators.

85.title: View MHE Type Labels Above Graph

content.text: The system shall display MHE type labels (e.g., Diesel Forklift, Order Picker, Stacker, VNA Truck) above the graph.
the user views above the graph
the system shall display MHE type labels.
The system shall provide an MHE Type multi-select dropdown (e.g., “5 Types Selected”).
the system shall display MHE Type multi-select dropdown.
The system shall allow users to select or deselect MHE types to filter displayed data points.
the user selects or deselects options
the system shall filter displayed data points.
The system shall open the MHE Type dropdown panel when the user clicks on the “MHE Type” control.
the system shall open the dropdown panel.
The system shall display a list of available MHE types in the dropdown.
the system shall display list of MHE types.
The system shall display each MHE type with a checkbox for selection.
the system shall display checkboxes for each MHE type.
The system shall allow users to select or deselect multiple MHE types.
the user selects or deselects options
the system shall update selections accordingly.
The system shall display the current selection count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”) at the top of the dropdown.
I know how many types are selected
the system shall display count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”).
The system shall enforce a maximum selection limit (e.g., maximum 5 MHE types).
the user tries to exceed the limit
the system shall restrict further selection.
The system shall display selected MHE types with checked, unchecked checkboxes.
the system shall display checked and unchecked states correctly.

95.title: View Helper Text for Selection Limit

content.text: The system shall display a helper text indicating the selection limit (e.g., “Select maximum 5 MHE type”).
the system shall display helper text for selection limit.
The system shall update the selected MHE count in real-time as users select/deselect options.
the system shall update count in real-time.
The system shall close the dropdown when the user clicks outside the dropdown area.
the dropdown to close on outside click
the system shall close the dropdown.

98.title: Dynamic Graph Update Based on Selection

content.text: The system shall update the graph dynamically based on selected MHE types.
the graph to update based on selected MHE types
the system shall update the graph dynamically.
The system shall provide a refresh control to reload the latest data.
the system shall reload correlation data.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over any data point.
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a tooltip.
The tooltip shall display the MHE Type name (e.g., VNA Truck), Average Speed value (km/h), Pallets per Hour value.
see MHE type, speed, and productivity
the user hovers over a point
the system shall display MHE type, average speed, and pallets per hour.
The tooltip shall display a colour indicator matching the selected data point.
see a colour indicator in the tooltip
I can match it with the data point
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a colour indicator matching the selected data point.
The system shall display horizontal and vertical reference lines dividing the graph into four quadrants.
see reference lines dividing the chart
the system shall display horizontal and vertical reference lines dividing it into four quadrants.
The system shall dynamically update the chart when data changes.
the system shall update the chart visualization.

105.title: View Distance Efficiency Analysis Chart Title

content.text: The system shall display a chart titled “Distance Efficiency Analysis.”
the system shall display “Distance Efficiency Analysis”.
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “Average Distance Travelled (meters).”
the system shall label it as “Average Distance Travelled (meters)”.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Cycle Time Range.”
see cycle time range on Y-axis
the system shall label it as “Cycle Time Range”.

108.title: Plot Distance vs Cycle Time Data Points

content.text: The system shall plot scatter data points representing each MHE based on distance travelled and cycle time.
the system shall plot data points based on distance travelled and cycle time.

109.title: Color-coded Markers for MHE Types (Distance Chart)

content.text: The system shall display each MHE type using distinct coloured markers (dots).
the system shall display distinct coloured markers for each MHE type.
The system shall display a legend showing MHE types with corresponding colour indicators.
the system shall display MHE types with corresponding colours.
The system shall display MHE type labels (e.g., Diesel Forklift, Order Picker, Stacker, VNA Truck).
the system shall display MHE type labels.

112.title: View MHE Type Multi-select Dropdown (Distance Chart)

content.text: The system shall provide an MHE Type multi-select dropdown (e.g., “4 Types Selected”).
the system shall display MHE Type multi-select dropdown.
The system shall open the MHE Type dropdown panel when the user clicks on the “MHE Type” control.
the system shall open the dropdown panel.
The system shall display a list of available MHE types in the dropdown.
the system shall display list of MHE types.

115.title: View Checkboxes for MHE Types (Distance Chart)

content.text: The system shall display each MHE type with a checkbox for selection.
The system shall allow users to select or deselect multiple MHE types.
The system shall display the current selection count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”) at the top of the dropdown.
the system shall display count (e.g., “4 of 5 selected”).
The system shall enforce a maximum selection limit (e.g., maximum 5 MHE types).
the user tries to exceed the limit
the system shall restrict further selection.
The system shall display selected MHE types with checked, unchecked checkboxes.
the system shall display correct checked/unchecked states.

120.title: View Helper Text for Selection Limit

content.text: The system shall display a helper text indicating the selection limit (e.g., “Select maximum 5 MHE type”).
the system shall display helper text.
The system shall update the selected MHE count in real-time as users select/deselect options.
the system shall update count in real-time.
The system shall close the dropdown when the user clicks outside the dropdown area.
dropdown to close on outside click
the system shall close the dropdown.

123.title: Dynamic Graph Update Based on MHE Selection

content.text: The system shall update the graph dynamically based on selected MHE types.
the graph to update based on selected MHE types
the system shall update the graph dynamically.
The system shall provide a refresh control to reload the latest data.
I can view the latest analytics
the user clicks the refresh control
the system shall reload the latest data.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over any data point.
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a tooltip.
The tooltip shall display the MHE Name/ID (e.g., MHE-006), MHE Type (e.g., VNA Truck), Average Distance value (meters), Cycle Time value (minutes).
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display MHE ID, MHE Type, Average Distance, and Cycle Time.
The tooltip shall display a colour indicator matching the selected data point.
see a matching colour indicator in tooltip
I can relate it to the data point
the system shall display a colour indicator matching the data point.

128.title: Highlight Data Point on Hover (Distance Chart)

content.text: The system shall visually highlight the hovered data point.
hovered data point to be highlighted
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall visually highlight the point.
The system shall display vertical and horizontal reference lines dividing the chart into quadrants.
the system shall display vertical and horizontal reference lines dividing the chart into quadrants.
The system shall dynamically update the graph when data changes.
the system shall update the graph visualization.
The system shall display a chart titled “Operator Utilization.”
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “Operator” showing operator names.
the system shall display operator names.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Utilization Distribution.”
the system shall label it as “Utilization Distribution”.
The system shall display stacked bar charts for each operator.
the system shall display stacked bar charts for each operator.
Each stacked bar shall represent cycle time distribution categories: Utilized, Non-Utilized, and Idle.
the system shall represent Utilized, Non-Utilized, and Idle categories.
The system shall display each category using distinct colours (e.g., Utilized, Non-Utilized, Idle).
the system shall use distinct colours for each category.
The system shall display a legend indicating Utilized, Non-Utilized, and Idle with corresponding colour indicators.
the system shall display Utilized, Non-Utilized, and Idle with colours.
The system shall ensure that the total of all stacked segments per operator equals 100% utilization distribution.
the system shall ensure each operator’s total equals 100%.
The system shall display operator names truncated if too long with ellipsis (e.g., Vikram Desh...).
the system shall truncate names with ellipsis.
The system shall provide a refresh control to reload the latest utilization data.
the system shall reload utilization data.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over any segment of the stacked bar.
the user hovers over a segment
the system shall display a tooltip.
The tooltip shall display Idle percentage/value, non-utilized percentage/value, Utilized percentage/value.
the system shall display Idle, Non-Utilized, and Utilized values.
The tooltip shall display values with proper formatting (e.g., decimal precision if applicable).
the system shall display values with proper formatting.
The system shall visually highlight the hovered bar or segment.
the user hovers over a segment
the system shall highlight the segment.
The system shall dynamically update the chart when underlying utilization data changes.
I see the latest utilization data
the system shall update the chart.
